title: Aapadam Apahartaram Mantra
intro: Read the Aapadam Apahartaram Mantra with meaning. Chant this mantra with devotion to find relief from all troubles and calamities.
description:
Main Mantra

Apadam Apahartaram Dataram Sarva Sampadam.
Lokabhiramam Shri Ramam Bhuyo Bhuyo Namamyaham.

English Meaning

I bow
again and again
to Lord Shri Rama,
who removes
all calamities,
bestows
every kind
of prosperity,
and delights
all the worlds.

faq.q1: When should Apadam Apahartaram Mantra be chanted?
faq.a1: Apadam Apahartaram Mantra may be chanted in the morning, evening, or during difficult times with devotion.
faq.q2: How many times should Apadam Apahartaram Mantra be chanted?
faq.a2: It is commonly chanted 11, 21, 51, or 108 times.
faq.q3: What are the benefits of chanting Apadam Apahartaram Mantra?
faq.a3: According to Hindu tradition, chanting this mantra is believed to invoke the blessings of Lord Rama, bring inner peace, courage, and strength to face life’s challenges.
faq.q4: Can Apadam Apahartaram Mantra be chanted daily?
faq.a4: Yes, Apadam Apahartaram Mantra can be chanted every day with devotion.
faq.q5: Can anyone chant Apadam Apahartaram Mantra?
faq.a5: Yes, anyone may chant Apadam Apahartaram Mantra with faith and devotion.
